name: Numverify
what_it_does: Validates phone numbers worldwide and returns carrier, line type, location, and formatting data via a simple REST API.
use_cases: Validate phone numbers at signup to reduce junk registrations
Identify carrier and line type (mobile vs. landline) before sending SMS
Normalize and format international phone numbers for storage
Enrich customer records with geographic and carrier metadata
not_for: Real-time caller ID or reverse phone lookup
High-volume production use on the free tier (100 lookups/month)
Guaranteed accuracy in all countries — coverage varies
best_when: Validating phone numbers during lead capture or onboarding when you need carrier and line-type data in a single call.
avoid_when: You need real-time lookup freshness or operate in regions with sparse coverage; consider Twilio Lookup instead.

auth.notes: API key passed as `access_key` query parameter on every request

pricing.notes: Free tier uses HTTP only; HTTPS requires a paid plan

performance.rate_limits: Varies by plan; free tier is soft-limited

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Returns numeric error codes with descriptions; not always actionable for agents
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Read-only GET requests are inherently idempotent
known_agent_gotchas: Free tier enforces HTTP only — HTTPS requires paid plan, which agents should verify before use
API key in query param risks leaking in logs; agents should sanitize URLs
100 free lookups/month exhausted quickly in any non-trivial agent workflow
Coverage and accuracy varies significantly by country

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS gated behind paid plans; API key exposed in query params rather than headers
